title: Nami Can Finally Smile
description: On pages 18–18, nami can finally smile focuses on Luffy, Nami, Arlong, Nojiko as luffy destroys Arlong Park and declares Nami his crewmate, ending Arlong’s rule over Cocoyashi.
scene: On pages 18–18, nami can finally smile focuses on Luffy, Nami, Arlong, Nojiko as luffy destroys Arlong Park and declares Nami his crewmate, ending Arlong’s rule over Cocoyashi.
summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
